overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit city. The player moves under elevated highways, passes a transit station, and approaches a burning skyscraper with red neon signage in a dystopian urban environment.

events.description: passing teal street sign reading Brandon on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-slicked sidewalk beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light-colored jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: teal street sign with white text reading Brandon mounted on a pole
massive concrete overpass structure with red warning lights along the edge
rain-slicked orange-tinted concrete pavement reflecting streetlights
colorful illuminated advertisements visible through the haze under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk street corner beneath a massive elevated highway. The camera moves forward past a teal street sign reading Brandon, following a pedestrian ahead. The wet concrete reflects the artificial lighting while red warning lights line the underside of the overpass above.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART transit station entrance under overpass

events.description: approaching illuminated transit station stairs on the right
passing large glowing cyan NCART sign on the retaining wall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the transit station entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian continuing forward past the transit stairs without ascending

entered.detail: large illuminated cyan sign reading NCART Night City Area Rapid Transit with arrow
concrete staircase with metal railings leading up to the transit platform
tall concrete wall with graffiti and the illuminated transit sign

segments.scene_description: The walk continues under the overpass toward a transit station entrance. The camera passes a glowing cyan NCART sign mounted on a concrete retaining wall, with stairs leading upward to the right. The pedestrian ahead continues forward, and the overpass structure shifts to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown street with view of burning megacorporation tower

events.description: camera tilts upward revealing massive burning skyscraper with red neon lights
flames and explosions visible at upper levels of the tower

agents.ego_description: walking forward while looking up at the burning tower and surrounding neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the distant burning tower

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with red neon lights and active fires burning on upper floors
large vertical digital billboards displaying colorful advertisements on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera moves past the transit station, revealing a wide view of a massive burning skyscraper towering ahead. Red neon lights outline the building while flames erupt from upper floors. Digital billboards line the right side of the street, and the camera tilts upward to take in the scale of the destruction before continuing forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic urban underpass into a wide, devastating view of a burning cityscape. It begins on a rain-slicked street corner beneath a massive elevated highway, moving past a teal street sign and following a pedestrian through the reflections of red warning lights on wet concrete. As the camera continues forward, the overpass structure shifts to the left, guiding the view past a glowing cyan NCART transit station entrance and its ascending stairs. The scene then opens up as the camera clears the station, revealing a towering skyscraper engulfed in flames and outlined by red neon lights. Finally, the camera tilts upward to capture the scale of the destruction and the surrounding digital billboards before continuing its advance toward the inferno.
